## Description

<!-- Describe the change. Link to the issue if applicable. -->

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Plugin addition or update
- [ ] Refactoring (no functional change)

## Testing

- [ ] `make test` passes locally
- [ ] Manual smoke test performed (link or describe in PR body)

## Documentation

- [ ] I have updated the documentation (`docs/`) for user-facing changes
- [ ] German translations updated if applicable (`README-de.md`, `docs/help/de/`)
- [ ] API changes reflected in FastAPI `/docs` endpoint (auto-generated)

## Plugin Impact (if applicable)

- [ ] This change affects a plugin. I have:
  - Updated the plugin's `pyproject.toml` version if the plugin itself changed
  - Tested the plugin locally
  - Updated the plugin's documentation

## Checklist

- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings or errors
- [ ] I have updated [CHANGELOG](../docs/CHANGELOG.md) if this is a user-facing change
- [ ] I agree to the [Code of Conduct](../CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md)
